case_title: RUTH CANDIDATO VS. MIKE LAU LONG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF RUTH CANDIDATO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKE LAU LUNI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SHE COULD NOT SERVE THE CLAIM AND CANNOT FIND THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SULVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50 REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEDT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANDIDATO, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, MIKE LAU

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-05-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RUTH CANDIDATO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKE LAU LONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,200.00 FILED BY CANDIDATO, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, MIKE LAU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
